requirement_topic.en: MTPC Type Approval (Radio & Telecom Terminal Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: MTPC型号认证（无线电及电信终端设备）
requirement_topic.zht: MTPC型號認證（無線電及電信終端設備）

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain mandatory type approval from the Ministry of Technology and Communications (MTPC) before being placed on the Lao market. A technical file and accredited test reports are required. CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not recognized as equivalent.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备在进入老挝市场前，必须获得信息技术与通信部（MTPC）的强制性型号认证。需提交技术文件及经认可的检测报告。CE、FCC及CCC标志不被视为等同认证。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備在進入寮國市場前，必須取得資訊科技與通信部（MTPC）的強制型號認證。須提交技術文件及經認可的檢測報告。CE、FCC及CCC標誌不被視為同等認證。

standards_or_laws: MTPC Regulation on Radio Equipment Type Approval
MTPC spectrum allocation — 5 GHz band authorized

summary.en: In China, wireless and telecom terminal devices require MIIT Network Access License (NAL) and SRRC radio type approval. These approvals are China-specific and have no mutual recognition with MTPC Laos.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及电信终端设备须取得工业和信息化部（MIIT）的进网许可证（NAL）及无线电管理局（SRRC）的无线电型号核准证。这些认证仅适用于中国市场，与MTPC老挝认证无互认协议。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及電信終端設備須取得工業和信息化部（MIIT）的進網許可證（NAL）及無線電管理局（SRRC）的無線電型號核准證。這些認證僅適用於中國市場，與MTPC寮國認證無互認協議。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — 工业和信息化部进网许可证
SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电型号核准

gap.en: Full re-certification required. Chinese MIIT/SRRC/CCC approvals are not accepted by MTPC. Importers must prepare a separate technical dossier and obtain Lao type approval independently.
gap.zh: 需完整重新认证。中国MIIT/SRRC/CCC认证不被MTPC接受。进口商须单独准备技术文件并独立申请老挝型号认证。
gap.zht: 需完整重新認證。中國MIIT/SRRC/CCC認證不被MTPC接受。進口商須單獨準備技術文件並獨立申請寮國型號認證。

source.publisher: Ministry of Technology and Communications, Lao PDR (MTPC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MTPC type approval is mandatory for all wireless/telecom terminal equipment entering Laos. Chinese approvals (SRRC, MIIT NAL, CCC) are not mutually recognized. Separate Lao certification is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MTPC型号认证对所有进入老挝的无线/电信终端设备为强制要求。中国认证（SRRC、MIIT NAL、CCC）不被互认，须单独申请老挝认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MTPC型號認證對所有進入寮國的無線/電信終端設備為強制要求。中國認證（SRRC、MIIT NAL、CCC）不被互認，須單獨申請寮國認證。
